name: cta-02
title: CTA 02 — animated band
description: Layout section, ships populated: narrow centered call-to-action band on a card surface with the pulse-grid canvas animation as the background slot fallback (two demo colors + faint lattice; tune the props in place or fill the slot to replace the layer).

files.content:
--- /** * Cta-02.astro -- layout section: narrow centered call-to-action band on * a card surface with the pulse-grid canvas animation as the background * layer. Ships populated (frontend-contract.md §7): renders a * complete block; make it yours by editing this copy you own. * * `background` slot: absolute layer INSIDE the band. Ships with a * demo (two accent-ish colors, faint lattice) as the slot * fallback -- tune its props in place, or fill the slot to replace the * whole layer (an image + scrim like cta-01, an effects item, anything). */ import { cn } from "../../../lib/utils"; import Button from "../Button.astro"; import PulseGrid from "../PulseGrid.astro"; interface Props { class?: string; [key: string]: unknown; } const { class: className, ...rest } = Astro.props; ---

Ship it with a pulse.

The band stays alive without demanding attention — the grid glows on its own clock.
